arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْعَلاَءِ، حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ إِدْرِيسَ، حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي زِيَادٍ، بِإِسْنَادِهِ فِي مِثْلِ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ زَادَ وَلَمْ يَقُمْ عِنْدَهَا ‏.‏

english.narrator:
The aforesaid tradition (No 1963) has also been transmitted by Yazid ibn AbuZiyad with a different chain of narrators. 





This version adds the words:
english.text: He (the Prophet) did not stand near it (the jamrah).

arabic.title: سنن أبي داود
arabic.author: الإمام سليمان بن الأشعث أبو داود السجستاني

english.title: Sunan Abi Dawud
english.author: Imam Sulayman ibn al-Ash'ath Abu Dawud al-Sijistani

chapter.english: The Rites of Hajj (Kitab Al-Manasik Wa'l-Hajj)
